sigWerErrors.reason: 'là' introduces a different grammatical structure, but does not by itself change the main meaning.
'thẻ' (card) and 'thể' (form/can) are completely different words, changing the meaning of the sentence.
Adds 'khía cạnh' (aspect), which shifts the focus of the sentence away from the original intent.
'chừng nào' (when) is replaced by 'khía cạnh nào' (which aspect), which changes the question from time to aspect.
